---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new capability for the IOS+ platform
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Summary
A brief, one-sentence summary of the feature request.

## Motivation
Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Detailed Description
Provide a detailed description of the proposed feature, including:
- User stories or use cases
- UI/UX mockups or descriptions
- API changes (if applicable)
- Data model changes (if applicable)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Impact Assessment
- **Affected Components:** (e.g., web UI, API, database, compliance engine)
- **Breaking Changes:** Yes / No
- **Migration Required:** Yes / No

## Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or references about the feature request here.
